title: Set up Prisma schema, PostgreSQL database, and seed scripts
description: Establish the base database schema with roles, users, and core tables. Create seed script for default roles (ADMIN, HR, MANAGER, EMPLOYEE) and a default admin user.
frontendWork: None
backendWork: Initialize Prisma client, create schema.prisma, set up db-backup.sh, and write seed.ts script.
databaseWork: Create PostgreSQL tables, constraints, and indexes.
testingWork: Verify seed script creates records in DB and migrations run successfully.
expectedOutput: Working database schema, Prisma client, and successful seeding of default data.

title: Implement core JWT Authentication and Role guards
description: Implement POST /api/auth/login, POST /api/auth/logout, and GET /api/auth/me. Write JWT verification and role-based route protection middleware on the backend.
frontendWork: Create LoginPage component, setup AuthContext, and secure routes in AppRouter.
backendWork: Write login, logout, me controllers, bcrypt password verification, JWT sign, and authenticate/role guard middleware.
databaseWork: Query User table and return linked Role.
testingWork: Unit tests for login, role guard blocking, and token validation.
expectedOutput: Secure login flow, authenticated sessions, and route guards active.

title: Implement Refresh Token Rotation and Secure Cookie Storage
description: Store refresh tokens in RefreshTokens database table. Deliver refresh tokens in HTTP-only, secure cookies. Implement POST /api/auth/refresh and enforce token revocation on logout.
frontendWork: Update axios interceptor to handle token refresh and automatic logout on session expiration.
backendWork: Implement /api/auth/refresh endpoint, token rotation logic, token hashing, and secure cookie configuration.
databaseWork: Create RefreshTokens table, manage relations, and delete tokens on revocation.
testingWork: Verify token rotation, invalid refresh rejection, and concurrent login stability.
expectedOutput: Silent token refresh active and secure cookie storage implemented.

title: Implement Employee CRUD APIs and basic layout
description: Create Employee table in DB. Write backend endpoints for employee listing, detail, creation, status updates, and soft delete.
frontendWork: Build EmployeesPage, EmployeeTable, and EmployeeForm for adding/editing records.
backendWork: Write employee routes, controllers for CRUD, validation using Zod, and manager reporting logic.
databaseWork: Create Employee table with unique constraints on employeeCode and userId.
testingWork: Test email uniqueness, code uniqueness, and soft delete flag updates.
expectedOutput: Admin and HR can manage employee profiles and view their details.

title: Implement Employee Profile tabs and document upload systems
description: Implement profile tabs for overview, attendance, leaves, payroll, and documents. Enable profile picture uploads and document management with file metadata in DB.
frontendWork: Create EmployeeProfilePage, AvatarUploadModal, and EmployeeDocumentsTab.
backendWork: Configure multer storage, implement document upload routes, and link file path references in database.
databaseWork: Create EmployeeDocument table linked to Employee.
testingWork: Verify mime-type validations, file size constraints, and file storage retrieval.
expectedOutput: Uploaded documents are saved to uploads/ folder and metadata is correctly linked in DB.

title: Implement Attendance Check-in, Check-out, and Break sessions
description: Implement daily check-in and check-out APIs. Calculate work hours and break duration server-side. Enforce one record per day and prevent checkout before checkin.
frontendWork: Build check-in/check-out toggle, break timer, and monthly calendar history widget.
backendWork: Write check-in, check-out, break start, break end controllers, late check-in calculations, and duration summation.
databaseWork: Create Attendance and BreakSession tables, unique index on (employeeId, attendanceDate).
testingWork: Test check-in/out order, duplicate check-in rejection, and correct duration counting.
expectedOutput: Employees can mark their attendance and break sessions with accurate server-side timing.

title: Implement Attendance Regularization and Manager reviews
description: Allow employees to submit regularization requests for missing check-ins or check-outs. Managers can approve or reject, which directly updates the attendance record.
frontendWork: Build AttendanceRequestsPage with submission forms and approval/rejection tables.
backendWork: Write request creation, manager approval/rejection endpoints, and auto-update of attendance records.
databaseWork: Create AttendanceRegularizationRequest table with index on employeeId and status.
testingWork: Verify that approved requests update check-in/out times in Attendance table, and rejected requests write a reason.
expectedOutput: Regularization workflow functions, modifying attendance logs on manager approval.

title: Implement Leave balance check and manager/HR approval workflow
description: Implement leave types (yearly, quarterly) and enforce balances. When applying for leave, validate date overlap and balance availability. Require manager approval, followed by HR approval.
frontendWork: Build LeavesPage with balance cards, apply form, and manager review tab.
backendWork: Write leave application routes, overlap checks, balance checks, and approval-step updates. Debit balances only on final HR approval.
databaseWork: Create LeaveType, LeaveBalance, LeaveRequest tables; unique index on (employeeId, leaveTypeId, year).
testingWork: Test overlapping leave rejection, balance exhaustion rejection, and balance debiting upon approval.
expectedOutput: Complete multi-tier leave approval workflow and balance tracker.

title: Implement Leave Medical Proof uploading and HR review rules
description: Automatically flag leaves longer than 3 days as requiring medical proof. Require upload of medical files and allow HR to approve or reject them.
frontendWork: Integrate document upload widget in Leave request timeline for pending medical proofs.
backendWork: Implement medical proof attachment fields in LeaveRequest, validation checks, and review APIs.
databaseWork: Add medicalProofStatus, medicalProofSubmittedAt, and file path fields to LeaveRequest.
testingWork: Verify that leaves requiring medical proof are blocked from final approval until uploaded and reviewed.
expectedOutput: Medical proof upload timeline and HR approval portal operational.

title: Implement Monthly Draft Payroll Generation
description: Implement basic monthly payroll generation based on employees' basic salary, allowances, and deductions. Support DRAFT status and list payroll records by employee.
frontendWork: Build PayrollPage with generation button, filter by month/year, and interactive list.
backendWork: Write payroll generation controller, calculate basic salaries, and return draft payroll records.
databaseWork: Create PayrollRecord table with unique constraint on (employeeId, month, year).
testingWork: Test monthly payroll record uniqueness and basic calculation logic.
expectedOutput: Draft payroll records can be generated monthly and filtered on the UI.

title: Implement Overtime session tracking and verifications
description: Allow employees to log overtime sessions (date, duration, reason). Managers/HR must verify these sessions, which then affect payroll incentives.
frontendWork: Integrate overtime log forms and verifications dashboard in PayrollPage.
backendWork: Write overtime log routes, status update APIs (verified, rejected), and calculations.
databaseWork: Create OvertimeSession table with index on employeeId and status.
testingWork: Verify status transitions and assert overtime minutes are added correctly.
expectedOutput: Overtime sessions logged by employees and verified by manager appear in payroll calculations.

title: Implement Incentives management and approvals
description: Implement incentive requests (performance bonus, referral, special achievements). Support approval flow. Approved incentives are added to the monthly payroll.
frontendWork: Create IncentivesPage and forms for submitting incentive requests.
backendWork: Write incentive endpoints, status updates, and payroll integration calculations.
databaseWork: Create Incentive table with indexes on employeeId, status, type.
testingWork: Test incentive additions to draft payroll calculations.
expectedOutput: Approved incentives are successfully processed and display on monthly payslips.

title: Implement Payroll finalization and publishing controls
description: Implement a locking mechanism to transition payroll records from DRAFT to FINALIZED. Send notifications to employees and publish PDF payslips.
frontendWork: Add lock button, status badges, and payslip PDF download button.
backendWork: Implement /api/payroll/:id/publish, locks validations, and payslip generation logic.
databaseWork: Update status column in PayrollRecord and store payslip metadata in Payslips table.
testingWork: Verify that a finalized payroll cannot be modified, and employees can only see their own published payslips.
expectedOutput: Lock button freezes editing; employees can download their respective payslip PDFs.

title: Implement Google Workspace OAuth linkage and token storage
description: Establish corporate Google OAuth handshake. Link user profile to their corporate Google email and store secure OAuth refresh tokens in the database.
frontendWork: Integrate 'Connect Google Workspace' button in Employee Profile under Integrations section. Handle callback page redirection.
backendWork: Create Google module, /api/google/auth-url, /api/google/callback callback handlers, and fetch user details from googleapis.
databaseWork: Add googleId, googleEmail, googleRefreshToken, and isGoogleLinked fields to User model.
testingWork: Verify Google authentication redirect, token exchange, and database fields encryption.
expectedOutput: Employees can connect their Google account, linking their profile in the database.

title: Automate Google Calendar Out-Of-Office blocking on Leave approvals
description: Whenever HR/manager approves a LeaveRequest, automatically invoke Google Calendar API to create an 'Out of Office (OOO)' calendar event for that employee.
backendWork: Write calendar-service.ts using googleapis, retrieve stored googleRefreshToken, handle offline syncing, and add Calendar event.
frontendWork: None
databaseWork: Read User OAuth tokens and link to approved LeaveRequest.
testingWork: Mock Google Calendar API, test event payload structure, and handle token expiration/refresh.
expectedOutput: Approved leave requests automatically reflect as Out of Office blocks on employee's Google Calendar.

title: Implement Microsoft Teams Alerts for Leave submissions and Friday updates
description: Trigger direct Microsoft Teams webhook alerts. Ping manager channel on employee LeaveRequest submission, and send automated Friday payroll notifications via Teams webhook connector.
backendWork: Write teams-service.ts to construct and dispatch adaptive card messages to Teams webhook channels.
frontendWork: None
databaseWork: N/A
testingWork: Assert adaptive card payload structures and verify webhook delivery.
expectedOutput: Managers receive direct alerts in MS Teams channels when leaves are applied, and bot delivers weekly announcements.

title: Lift Employee Summary data to global context to avoid redundant fetches
description: Navbar and Dashboard independently hit /dashboard/employee-summary. Consolidate these by lifting summary data into a shared React Context/State, making a single API fetch on load.
frontendWork: Refactor AppContext to store employeeSummary; update Navbar and DashboardPage widgets to consume this state.
backendWork: None
databaseWork: N/A
testingWork: Inspect browser network tab and verify exactly one API request is made for employee-summary on page load.
expectedOutput: Eliminate duplicate summary fetches on dashboard landing, reducing API hits by 50%.

title: Implement selective database field fetching for Employee/Manager objects
description: Optimize Prisma queries to fetch only necessary fields (e.g., id, firstName, lastName, employeeCode) for manager/employee listings and selectors, reducing network overhead.
frontendWork: Adapt type interfaces if necessary to accommodate selective payloads.
backendWork: Modify Prisma select scopes in employee routes/services to omit heavy metadata fields when displaying simple name labels.
databaseWork: Prisma projection queries optimization.
testingWork: Measure response payload size and assert it is reduced by at least 70% for listings.
expectedOutput: Clean, lightweight JSON payloads for employee dropdowns and listings.

title: Build C# Desktop agent and integrate with attendance break workflows
description: Develop native Windows C# desktop tray application to track locks, wakes, sleep, and user idleness, forwarding events to POST /api/attendance/desktop-event to automate break sessions and checkouts.
backendWork: Add DesktopActivityLog database schema, implement express route POST /api/attendance/desktop-event to capture raw telemetry, automate break sessions and checkout on shutdown.
frontendWork: None
databaseWork: Add DesktopActivityLog table and indexes via prisma db push.
testingWork: Compile standalone release executable, launch and test local connection, verify automated break creation on system locking/idleness.
expectedOutput: Standalone IntelliHrHub desktop agent (.exe) compiled and live-syncing telemetry to backend.

title: Implement Live Status Badges & Workday Timeline Integration
description: Implement real-time desktop telemetry status indicators (Active, Away, Offline) across layouts. Merge Live Status Tracker panel in Attendance Page, and enable historical date-aware Workday Timeline views.
frontendWork: Consume liveStatuses context, render badges in Navbar, Sidebar, Employee Table. Build Live Status Tracker panel in AttendancePage and workday timeline modal.
backendWork: Implement /api/attendance/live-status endpoint and include break sessions in historical attendance queries.
databaseWork: None
testingWork: Manual verification of status updates and history popups; tsc compilation and production build validation.
expectedOutput: Real-time badges functional on site, live workforce status tracker active, historical workday timeline accessible.

title: Redesign Workday Timeline with Desktop Telemetry Logs
description: Overhaul the Workday Timeline to show rich activity segments (Active, Idle, Locked), a sleek collapsed state, and a split expanded view with chronological Event Log and Day Summary.
frontendWork: Refactor WorkdayTimeline.tsx to fetch desktop logs, segment activity periods, render markers, and restyle with an Event Log layout.
backendWork: Add GET /api/attendance/desktop-activity-log endpoint to serve timestamped desktop telemetry events.
databaseWork: None
testingWork: Verify timeline segments render correctly based on desktop telemetry event types.
expectedOutput: Workday Timeline successfully acts as a flagship USP feature, vividly showing employee daily activity.

title: Integrate check-in/out and break reminders and dynamic logging in Desktop Agent
description: Implement state-aware dynamic tray context menu, native Windows Toast notifications, custom slide-up reminder forms, and background status checking/snooze timers in the C# Desktop Agent.
frontendWork: None (done in desktop C#)
backendWork: Implement check-in, check-out and break status API queries for the agent if needed, or use existing endpoints.
databaseWork: None
apiWork: Get user status and trigger checkin/checkout/break endpoints.
testingWork: Verify dynamic tray menu changes states, Toast notifications trigger on schedule, and snooze timers fire correctly.
expectedOutput: Desktop Agent displays native reminders, custom popups, and state-aware context menus for check-in/out and breaks.

title: Implement visible desktop dashboard mini-app with telemetry logs and clocking controls
description: Develop a visible Windows Forms Dashboard window in the C# Desktop Agent. Features include a state-aware quick action grid (Check-In, Lunch, Tea, Check-Out) with active workday/break timers, and a live activity logger subscribing to background telemetry events.
frontendWork: None
backendWork: None
databaseWork: None
apiWork: Integrate C# client with existing attendance/break APIs.
testingWork: Verify dashboard opens on tray double-click, buttons enable/disable dynamically, timers tick accurately, and events log in real-time.
expectedOutput: Desktop Agent features a fully functional visible dashboard window with telemetry event logging and state-aware marking controls.

title: Implement Points Dispute Tickets raising and resolution workflow
description: Add PointsDisputeTicket database model. Implement backend POST/GET endpoints for raising and listing disputes, and POST resolve endpoint with automatic points reversal inside database transactions. Overhaul Leaderboard frontend points history modal with raise options and build HR Disputes Queue tab.
frontendWork: Add dispute raising form to Points History modal, display ticket status, and build HR Disputes Queue tab under Leaderboard page.
backendWork: Implement POST /api/employees/disputes, GET /api/employees/disputes, and POST /api/employees/disputes/:id/resolve with rollback transaction.
databaseWork: Add PointsDisputeTicket model and PointsDisputeStatus enum to Prisma schema.
testingWork: Manual verification of raising dispute, HR review, approval points reversal, and database consistency.
expectedOutput: Employees can raise dispute tickets for point transactions, and HR can resolve/reverse points automatically from their queue.
